description_long: This is a modern, multi-story hostel building with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The exterior is predominantly clad in a light, reflective material, possibly concrete or metal panels, with numerous large, blue-tinted windows arranged in a regular grid pattern across all facades. The structure features a partially open courtyard or terrace area on one side, visible from above, which is bordered by the building on three sides and includes a green patch that may serve as a small garden or recreational space. The roof includes both solid and open grid-like sections, suggesting communal or utility areas. The building sits on a geometric, patterned base that may represent a stylized sidewalk or plaza. There are no visible balconies, and the overall design is minimalist with clean lines and a focus on functionality.
description: A modern, rectangular hostel with a flat roof, blue-tinted windows, and a partially open courtyard. The exterior is light-colored and features a geometric, patterned base.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with a prominent grid of windows and a glimpse into the open courtyard area.
description_view_1: This angle shows the rear and side of the building, emphasizing the open grid roof section and the regular window arrangement.
description_view_2: This perspective provides a clear look into the courtyard and green patch, as well as the patterned base extending outward.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the long side of the building, showing the uninterrupted window grid and the solid, flat roof.
attribute_entrance_design: The main entrance is not clearly visible in the provided views, but the design likely features a standard doorway integrated into the ground floor facade, matching the minimalist and modern aesthetic with glass and metal materials. No steps, ramps, or canopies are distinctly visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are large, rectangular, and blue-tinted, arranged in a regular, grid-like pattern across all visible facades. Each floor has a consistent row of windows, contributing to a sense of symmetry and modernity. No decorative frames or shutters are present.
attribute_architectural_style: Contemporary with minimalist and modernist influences, characterized by clean lines, flat roof, and a functional, geometric layout.
